chunks.text: August 12, 2025. Guiding Berkeley’s largest academic department into new territory. As a professor in the Department of Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences (EECS) at UC Berkeley, Claire Tomlin has spent her career researching ways to enable autonomous systems to navigate safely. But over the past four years as department chair, she also focused on responsibly steering EECS.
chunks.question: What is Claire Tomlin's role and focus at UC Berkeley?
chunks.answer: Professor and department chair steering EECS.

chunks.text: August 1, 2024. PhD student aims to improve AI for underserved languages and communities.
chunks.question: What is the goal of the PhD student mentioned?
chunks.answer: Improve AI for underserved languages and communities.

chunks.text: July 26, 2018. Enter the BlackBerry Spark Hackathon. Enter the BlackBerry’s Spark Hackathon for the chance to win a free trip to New York or London, where they will demo their application at a BlackBerry Security Summit. Can you please pass this invitation along to your students who excel in computer science? It’s a really exciting opportunity for students.
chunks.question: What opportunity is offered in the BlackBerry Spark Hackathon?
chunks.answer: Win a trip to demo at a security summit.

chunks.text: July 26, 2018. Video Game & Board Game Playtest! The Nuclear Science and Security Consortium (NSSC) and the Project on Nuclear Gaming (PoNG) invite you to playtest a game called Signal, developed in partnership between UC Berkeley students and scientists from both Sandia and Lawrence Livermore National Laboratories. Signal will be playtested in a gaming event.
chunks.question: What is the purpose of the playtest event?
chunks.answer: Playtest the Signal game developed by students and scientists.

chunks.text: June 14, 2018. AISES: Great Scholarship Opportunity with Intel! Applications Closing May 15. I hope you can help me get the word out about this scholarship for Native students – both undergraduates and graduates. I am extending the scholarship deadline for the Intel scholarships to May 15, 2018. Thank you so much for your help in getting the word out about this scholarship.
chunks.question: What is the scholarship opportunity and deadline?
chunks.answer: Intel scholarships for Native students, deadline May 15, 2018.

chunks.text: June 14, 2018. Who wants to be a Google Games Champion? Come on down, Berkeley students! Do you want to be a contestant at this years Google Games? Is your team ready to challenge yourselves, win prizes and have fun? Well, we invite you to register for The Google Games Bay Area taking place in 2018.
chunks.question: What event is being promoted to Berkeley students?
chunks.answer: The Google Games Bay Area competition.

chunks.text: June 13, 2018. Blockchain Funding Opportunities. WHO WE ARE mouseBelt Labs is an ICO startup accelerator funding 10 companies in 2018 through our classOne program starting August 1. We also fund academic blockchain projects through our summerOne grant program starting June 15. WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR: We want to support students, grad students and researchers in blockchain projects.
chunks.question: What does mouseBelt Labs offer for blockchain projects?
chunks.answer: Funding for startups and academic blockchain projects.
